name: @shogo-ai/metal-agent
description: Per-host Firecracker node-agent for the cloud-agnostic microVM runtime substrate (Cloud Firecracker snapshots plan). Runs on bare-metal Linux hosts (e.g. Latitude.sh), manages a warm pool of Firecracker microVMs, and exposes the same /pool/assign + /health contract used by the K8s warm pool. Suspend-to-snapshot on idle, restore-from-snapshot on open.
